educational_objective: Support short shared reading with flaps, touch, faces and peek moments.
age_stage_nuance: Join-in beats long stories; board pages survive mouthing.
what_to_look_for: Board pages, UK publisher or Amazon buyable, clear baby marks.
what_to_avoid: Paper-only editions for this age, Argos-only primaries.
methodology: Benchmarked Penguin, Priddy and Amazon UK board books (bench). Captured age marks from live listings (age). Ranked flaps, touch, peep, Spot, faces, photos, die-cut peek, words, then retail backups (rank). URL-verified buyable UK primaries on 2026-07-24 (url). Avoided Argos and John Lewis primaries after availability fetch failures in this environment.
buying_factor_memo: Multiple ownership. Lead interactive classics, then faces, then peek and words, then retail backups for buyability. Max two per brand imprint.

top_picks.best_for_tag: Best for lift the flap zoo
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A sturdy board book with lift the flaps revealing animals, perfect for shared pointing and short reading spells on the sofa.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Flaps turn listening into a reach on the sofa. At seven to nine months the game is lift, look and laugh together. Lift the flap zoo when you want a classic join in book that survives chewing at the corners.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #1 over #2: strongest join-in flap classic with publisher primary.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A touchy feely board book with textured patches on each puppy page, inviting hands to explore while you name what they feel.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Textures give mouthing hands a job on the page while you read. You still lead the words in a soft voice. Touchy puppy pages when flaps feel too fiddly and you want soft patches instead of cardboard doors. Leave That's not my puppy.. out where they can find it again tomorrow.
top_picks.ownership_note: One puppy is enough to start the series.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #2 over #3: touch patches distinct from flap and peek games.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A classic day in the life board book with peep holes through the pages, made for shared pointing and short join in refrains on the sofa.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Peep holes reward looking ahead while you name the ordinary day together. It is still a sofa book, not a teaching session. Day in pictures when animal flaps are already owned and you want home scenes instead. One short go with Peepo! is enough before you tidy away.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #3 over #4: peep-hole join-in distinct from Spot flaps.

top_picks.best_for_tag: Best for hide and seek flaps
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A lift the flap board book hunting for Spot behind doors and curtains, ideal for short hide and seek reading rounds.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Hide and seek on the page matches the scarf games on the floor. Keep rounds short and playful. Hide and seek flaps when Dear Zoo is already chewed and you want another flap language for evenings. Stay nearby while they try Where's Spot?, then stop on a good note.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #4 over #5: flap hide-and-seek distinct from high-contrast faces.

top_picks.product_name: Baby Touch Faces Black and White Book
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A high contrast board book of faces, sized for short looking spells and finger tracing on black and white pages.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Faces still stop a restless sit on your lap. High contrast keeps the page simple when colour books feel crowded. High contrast faces when you want a quiet looking book between noisier flap sessions. Put Baby Touch Faces Black where you both sit most evenings so the invite is easy.
top_picks.ownership_note: One faces book is enough to start.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #5 over #6: publisher primary faces book before Priddy colour faces.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A board book of baby faces in clear photos, made for pointing, naming and short shared looking on the sofa.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Photos feel closer to real faces than drawings on the page. Keep naming soft and short. Photo face pages when high contrast Ladybird is done and you want real expressions next on the sofa. Put Hello Baby Faces where you both sit most evenings so the invite is easy.
top_picks.ownership_note: Pairs with Ladybird faces; different look.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #6 over #7: publisher face photos before Nosy Crow peeks.
top_picks.missed_top5_reason: Missed Top 5: faces depth already led by Ladybird high contrast; photo edition ranks sixth for variety.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A compact Ladybird faces board book with high contrast looking pages, sized for short shared face pointing on the sofa.
top_picks.ember_verdict: A second faces book keeps looking practice fresh after black and white Ladybird. Keep rounds short and soft. First focus faces when you want another quiet face book without marketplace cart friction on a weeknight. Let them finish the turn with Baby Touch Faces First, then close the activity kindly.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #7: peekaboo die cuts after flap and face leaders.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Non-Amazon primary for FF smoke on 2026-07-24. Missed Top 5: face depth already led by Baby Touch Faces; this is variety.
top_picks.missed_top5_reason: Missed Top 5: face depth already led by Baby Touch Faces; this is variety.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Penguin board listing of Peepo for when you want the day in pictures classic from the publisher page with peep holes through the pages.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Same peep holes as rank three with a publisher cart that stays buyable. Buy the title once only. Peep hole backup when specialist carts return errors and you still want Peepo on the sofa tonight. If interest fades, pack Peepo! away and try again another day.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #8: naming book after interactive leaders; second Usborne within cap.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Switched off Books4People 429 to Penguin Peepo twin on 2026-07-24.
top_picks.missed_top5_reason: Missed Top 5: duplicate of rank 3 for publisher buyability after Books4People 429.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: The Penguin publisher board listing for Dear Zoo, used when you want the flap classic from the imprint page rather than a marketplace cart.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Same flaps as rank one with a publisher cart. Buy the title once only. Publisher Dear Zoo when Amazon is blocked and you still want the classic on the shelf today. Use Dear Zoo as the second option when the first favourite is already out.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #9: retail backup of #1 for buyability; not a new title.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Non-Amazon primary for FF smoke on 2026-07-24. Missed Top 5: duplicate title of rank 1 kept as publisher buyability twin.
top_picks.missed_top5_reason: Missed Top 5: duplicate title of rank 1 kept as publisher buyability twin.

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: The Penguin publisher board listing for Where Spot, for easy UK buying of the hide and seek flap classic. for shared play on the sofa.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Same hide and seek flaps as rank four. Buy the title once only. Publisher Spot when marketplace carts fail and you still want Spot on the shelf today. Keep the session short with Where's Spot? so it stays a friendly invite.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #10: retail backup of Spot; variety already covered above.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Non-Amazon primary for FF smoke on 2026-07-24. Missed Top 5: duplicate of rank 4 for publisher buyability only.
top_picks.missed_top5_reason: Missed Top 5: duplicate of rank 4 for publisher buyability only.

ingestion_ready.founder_review_notes: Ranks 9-10 are retail backups of 1 and 4 - do not double-buy. Usborne words ASIN founder confirm.
